data.name: Pilot Archon Node
data.goal: Archon node launch readiness: verify identity, wallet, mediator, and L402 gateway

data.name: did:cid identity
data.claim: Node must present Ed25519-backed did:cid identity before services launch.
data.last_evidence: Local fixture: test key signs a challenge and verification succeeds.

data.name: LNbits per-DID wallet
data.claim: Wallet can open only after the node identity is verified.
data.last_evidence: Local fixture: LNbits per-DID wallet smoke test passed.

data.name: Lightning mediator
data.claim: Mediator depends on LNbits wallet readiness.
data.last_evidence: Local fixture: Lightning mediator smoke test passed.

data.name: Drawbridge L402 gateway
data.claim: Gateway can mint L402 access only after mediator is live.
data.last_evidence: Local fixture: Drawbridge L402 gateway smoke test passed.

data.text: Local fixture: test key signs a challenge and verification succeeds.
Local fixture: LNbits per-DID wallet smoke test passed.
Local fixture: Lightning mediator smoke test passed.
Local fixture: Drawbridge L402 gateway smoke test passed.

data.title: Archon pilot readiness memo
data.summary: All four launch capabilities reached verified state through evidence edges and unblocks edges.
